item.title: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naru…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Marisa Monday! The current vibe is thinking about Naruto! ngl Naruto was such an awesome anime 🥹 it was filled with a ton of cool fight scenes, and it also had some comfy moments too 😊 it's one of my childhood favorites! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 6月29日 月曜日☁☀️ 室温30.2℃ ３連勤終了なり。。。 明日は休みなり。。 今日も暑かった〜🫠 梅雨の晴れ間は…
item.author: 菊理（くくり）スランプ脱出中 (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵
item.content:encoded:
6月29日 月曜日☁☀️
室温30.2℃
３連勤終了なり。。。
明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった〜🫠
梅雨の晴れ間はいいけど、暑すぎる…🫠
今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🍵

item.title: 今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀) It's my hubby birthday …
item.author: Hanachu (@dokikawahanachu.bsky.social)
item.description:
今日は旦那の誕生日なので、彼が好きな刀語の絵を描きました。(*´∀｀)

It's my hubby birthday so I drew his favourite, Katanagatari !

#art #artsky #fanart #katanagatari
#アナログ絵
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook emerged as the victor in …
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook emerged as the victor in Monday’s Supreme Court ruling blocking President Trump’s attempt to fire her. But arguably the biggest winner is Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh.
item.content:encoded: Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook emerged as the victor in Monday’s Supreme Court ruling blocking President Trump’s attempt to fire her. But arguably the biggest winner is Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh.

item.title: ‎なっ…なんと ‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦 ‎ ‎そして…説教💦 ‎ ‎『何よ！ ‎たかがイタズラDMで …
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎なっ…なんと
‎娘達にブルスカ投稿を見られた💦
‎
‎そして…説教💦
‎
‎『何よ！
‎たかがイタズラDMで
引っ込むなよ〜』
‎
‎『男でしょうよ！』
‎
‎✳️あんたら女でしょ？
‎
‎『でも…
毘沙門天はイケて無いね』
‎
‎『私はもっと可愛らしいよね…』
‎
‎✳️自分で言えるツワモノすぎる💦
‎
‎長女の言葉が強烈だった…
‎
‎『お父さん、
家族愛を堂々と言えることは
‎カッコいいよ』
‎
‎『負けるな
私のスーパーお父さん！』
‎
‎そして…焼肉を奢らされた💦

よー高い肉を食べるの〜🤣
✳️ダイエット中では😆
‎
‎

item.title: US judge won't block planned job cuts at FEMA, for now reut.…
item.author: Reuters (@reuters.com)
item.description: US judge won't block planned job cuts at FEMA, for now reut.rs/4vDPG3e
item.content:encoded: US judge won't block planned job cuts at FEMA, for now reut.rs/4vDPG3e

item.title: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. Thi…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊
item.content:encoded: I watched Garden of Remembrance! The movie was 18m long. This was a cool experience! The movie told its story entirely through music and visuals, it was unique and well executed! The soundtrack was nice as well, and the art style was beautiful with a vibrant color palette! It was a pleasant movie 😊

item.title: In Celaya, Mexico, cartels have turned soccer fields into bl…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: In Celaya, Mexico, cartels have turned soccer fields into bloody battlefields as they have co-opted local leagues for teenagers as their latest business endeavor. One soccer coach is trying to recruit young players before the cartels do.
item.content:encoded: In Celaya, Mexico, cartels have turned soccer fields into bloody battlefields as they have co-opted local leagues for teenagers as their latest business endeavor. One soccer coach is trying to recruit young players before the cartels do.

item.title: #今月描いた絵を晒そう #fanart ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。 連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでく…
item.author: 羽成ふみ✍🏻お通販開店中（6月いっぱいまで） (@tokeruwakusei.bsky.social)
item.description:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。
item.content:encoded:
#今月描いた絵を晒そう　#fanart
ファンアートと絵日記でしたね。
連れ歩きポケ絵は羽成お気に入りです☺️（遊んでくださってありがとうございました。）ステゴは次回があればもっと手癖もりもりで挑んでみたいです…。

item.title: Susan Tedeschi Says Bob Weir Loved to Offer Her Mushrooms T…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Susan Tedeschi Says Bob Weir Loved to Offer Her Mushrooms

The Tedeschi Trucks Band singer toured with the Other Ones in 2002: "You're about to play ‘Shakedown Street,’ and you just did a heroic dose of mushrooms. How do you even perform?"

More: bit.ly/4f7TN1I
item.content:encoded:
Susan Tedeschi Says Bob Weir Loved to Offer Her Mushrooms

The Tedeschi Trucks Band singer toured with the Other Ones in 2002: "You're about to play ‘Shakedown Street,’ and you just did a heroic dose of mushrooms. How do you even perform?"

More: bit.ly/4f7TN1I

item.title: Trees absorb carbon dioxide—a primary driver of climate chan…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: Trees absorb carbon dioxide—a primary driver of climate change—and convert it into oxygen, which is essential for life on Earth. A single mature tree can produce enough oxygen to sustain two to four people daily. Just imagine the impact of a tree-lined avenue, a park, or an urban forest.
item.content:encoded: Trees absorb carbon dioxide—a primary driver of climate change—and convert it into oxygen, which is essential for life on Earth. A single mature tree can produce enough oxygen to sustain two to four people daily. Just imagine the impact of a tree-lined avenue, a park, or an urban forest.

item.title: A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue o…
item.author: Butterflies Katz ⓥ (@butterflieskatz.bsky.social)
item.description:
A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue of Liberty covering her eyes (in shame) in Roubaix, France (in 2025, just before July 4th).

Judith de Leeuw, also known as JDL #StreetArt, creates #murals worldwide (41 countries) to draw attention to social issues. info@jdlstreetart.com
item.content:encoded:
A #mural by Dutch #artist Judith de Leeuw shows the Statue of Liberty covering her eyes (in shame) in Roubaix, France (in 2025, just before July 4th).

Judith de Leeuw, also known as JDL #StreetArt, creates #murals worldwide (41 countries) to draw attention to social issues. info@jdlstreetart.com

item.title: NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org
item.content:encoded:
NEW: It has been 118 years since the Supreme Court ruled the federal government owes tribes water, but Native American communities in northern Arizona are still fighting for their rights to the Colorado River.

With @kjzz.org

item.title: The court’s ruling means state laws that allow ballots to be…
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The court’s ruling means state laws that allow ballots to be received after Election Day can stand.
item.content:encoded: The court’s ruling means state laws that allow ballots to be received after Election Day can stand.

item.title: Päivän posi: haettiin lomapaikkakunnasta eli Heinolan kirja…
item.author: Susanna (@bysusanna.bsky.social)
item.description:
Päivän posi:

haettiin lomapaikkakunnasta eli Heinolan kirjastosta kirjastokortit pojan kanssa.

En edes muista milloin olisimme Helsingissä löytäneet suoraan hyllyistä näin paljon lainattavaa. Piti jo stoppi laittaa 😅

Tiedän mitä teemme lähipäivät 😊
item.content:encoded:
Päivän posi:

haettiin lomapaikkakunnasta eli Heinolan kirjastosta kirjastokortit pojan kanssa.

En edes muista milloin olisimme Helsingissä löytäneet suoraan hyllyistä näin paljon lainattavaa. Piti jo stoppi laittaa 😅

Tiedän mitä teemme lähipäivät 😊

item.title: I'm reposting this photo of a beautiful spray can paintings …
item.author: Brad Holkesvig (@bradjholk.bsky.social)
item.description: I'm reposting this photo of a beautiful spray can paintings that includes some rollers and brush work too on the wall of an apartment building in northern Barcelona. I think it's one of the most fascinating paintings on a wall I have ever seen before. #SprayCanArt #Barcelona #Art #Photography
item.content:encoded: I'm reposting this photo of a beautiful spray can paintings that includes some rollers and brush work too on the wall of an apartment building in northern Barcelona. I think it's one of the most fascinating paintings on a wall I have ever seen before. #SprayCanArt #Barcelona #Art #Photography

item.title: "Everyone will be affected, not just scientists. Every commu…
item.author: The Verge (@theverge.com)
item.description:
"Everyone will be affected, not just scientists. Every community in the country.“

A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there’s still time to fight it.

Read more from @beebrookshire.bsky.social: www.theverge.com/science/9576...
item.content:encoded:
"Everyone will be affected, not just scientists. Every community in the country.“

A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there’s still time to fight it.

item.title: Round Top peak off the Pacific Crest Trail and other #trail …
item.author: Tramonte's TrailPhotos (@tramontes-t-photos.bsky.social)
item.description:
Round Top peak off the Pacific Crest Trail and other #trail loops around Carson Pass off Hwy 88 in the #SierraNevada of northern #California, for #MountainMonday and #BlueSkyMonday.

#ECK #landscapephotography #nature #outdoors #landscape #mountains #WestCoastKin #hiking
item.content:encoded:

item.title: "There needs to be immediate action by Congress to create pa…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: "There needs to be immediate action by Congress to create pathways to residency for holders of this status, to intervene in the catastrophe that will unfold if over a million people are pushed into undocumented status, and quite possibly to their deaths," writes @hebagowayed.bsky.social.
item.content:encoded: "There needs to be immediate action by Congress to create pathways to residency for holders of this status, to intervene in the catastrophe that will unfold if over a million people are pushed into undocumented status, and quite possibly to their deaths," writes @hebagowayed.bsky.social.

item.title: A foto mais fofa que você verá hoje
item.author: Bichinhos Fofinhos pra quem ta cansado (@bichinhos.bsky.social)
item.description: A foto mais fofa que você verá hoje
item.content:encoded: A foto mais fofa que você verá hoje
